narrative:
Hamilton Township has 24,081 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.8 percentage points.
